# Health and Safety Kits

> One-time download health and safety compliance kits for small trades and sole traders. No subscriptions, no SaaS, no consultants.

## Products

- Free Sample Kit: Preview quality before you buy. No email, no signup required.
- Basic Kit (£49): Core H&S policy, 3 risk assessments, COSHH template, incident report form, staff induction checklist. Single business licence.
- Pro Kit (£79): Everything in Basic plus editable Word/Excel versions, additional risk assessments, training slides, staff quiz, method statements, and unlimited internal use.

## Key Facts

- One-time download, not a subscription
- Trade-specific templates (cleaning, landscaping, beauty, dog grooming, and more)
- Designed for sole traders and micro businesses (1-5 staff)
- Compliance-ready in 60 minutes
- UK Health and Safety at Work Act 1974 aligned
- Delivered via Gumroad (instant digital download)
- Privacy-friendly: no tracking cookies, no logins required

## Pricing

- Free Sample: £0 (no signup)
- Basic Kit: £49 (one-time)
- Pro Kit: £79 (one-time)
